# Reasoning Wrapper - Add Explicit Reasoning to Any Command or Code

<task>
Wraps any command or code with explicit reasoning traces and decision tracking for: $ARGUMENTS
</task>

<context>
This meta-command wraps any command, tool, or action with transparent reasoning layers, making all decision-making processes explicit and traceable.

Core capabilities:
- Wrap existing commands with reasoning blocks
- Add automatic complexity detection
- Inject MCP integration points
- Provide explicit reason...
